basics.name: Arafat Ibne Ikram
basics.label: Electrical Engineer
basics.summary: Seek and maintain a full-time position that offers professional challenges utilizing technical skills, educational knowledge, time management, and problem-solving skills.

work.name: Catalyst Solutions (Sister concern of Adiva Graphics)
work.summary: Primary task was to analyse, visualize, and error checking of market research data including collected brand public awareness, brand perception, brand health tracking data for world leading research firm such as IPSOS & LRW material..

work.name: International Islamic University Chittagong
work.summary: GTA for the following Tutorial sessions, Laboratory demonstrations, and Viva session of undergraduate program
highlights: Assessing Renewable generation using Weibull distribution & beta function.
MPPT based PV Design using MATLAB simulation environment.
Simulation on HOMER for Distributed generation and assessing CAPEX and LCOE for projected model.

volunteer.institution: Dept. of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, International Islamic University Chittagong
volunteer.summary: Utilized communication skill, analytical ability to lead the team to achieve the best group of all while advancing the trainee session.
highlights: Arranging workshop on Line follower robots, application of various sensor.
Webinar for undergraduate students about IoT based project, Arduino, Raspberry pi etc.

awards.title: Nobel Prize in Physics
awards.summary: The Nobel Prizes are five separate prizes that, according to Alfred Nobel's will of 1895, are awarded to 'those who, during the preceding year, have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind.'

journal publications.name: Zur Elektrody/namik bewegter Körper
journal publications.summary: It concerned an interpretation of the Michelson–Morley experiment and the properties of light and time. Special relativity incorporates the principle that the speed of light is the same for all inertial observers regardless of the state of motion of the source.

journal publications.name: Die Grundlage der allgemeinen Relativitätstheorie
journal publications.summary: The publication of the theory of general relativity made him internationally famous. He was professor of physics at the universities of Zurich (1909–1911) and Prague (1911–1912), before he returned to ETH Zurich (1912–1914).

research experience.institution: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals
research experience.summary: Waste-to-energy generation sources incorporated with renewable energy sources considering annual cost, risk factor, and life cycle assessment were assessed in this work, manuscript is under consideration for publication.

projects.name: IoT based Smart traffic control (Discontinued)
projects.summary: IoT-based smart traffic control uses interconnected devices to optimize traffic flow, reduce congestion, and enhance road safety through real-time monitoring and adaptive signaling.

projects.name: Smart Agriculture System
projects.summary: PIC based, Automatic Agricultural system that pump water to plant and control humidity as needed.

projects.name: Arduino automatic Rail-Gate control
projects.summary: Arduino based Project, that would close and open the gate respect to whether train crossing the road.

references.name: Dr. Md. Shafiullah
references.reference: Arafat possesses not only a strong academic foundation but also a genuine passion for his field of study. During our time working together, he consistently demonstrated an eagerness to learn and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

references.name: Dr. Aasim Ullah
references.reference: I had the opportunity to work closely with Arafat on his research article titled 'Optimizing Energy Consumption in Smart Homes: Load Scheduling Approaches', where he showed decent analytical skills, innovative thinking, and the ability to address complex problems in the domain of smart grid technology, which is a testament to its quality and the dedication Arafat has invested in it.
